title: Creating Shopify Fulfillment with Integromat based on Column Value in Monday
excerpt: We are trying to automate, through Integromat, the creation and completion of a Shopify fulfillment, triggered when a shipping code is applied to specific items in our Monday board.  When we apply a filter of “Shipping C…

posts.author: JoeyHaverty (Joseph Haverty)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are trying to automate, through Integromat, the creation and completion of a Shopify fulfillment, triggered when a shipping code is applied to specific items in our Monday board. When we apply a filter of “Shipping Code Exists”, the fulfillment will go through, but it sends the fulfillment e-mail to all orders, regardless of fulfillment status, with the shipping info of the target order. Please advise on how to go about this issue.
@JCorrell @CLGPatrick

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JoeyHaverty,

More than happy to lend a hand. I’ll DM you.

Jim

posts.author: Michaela_Staffova (Michaela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JoeyHaverty , Michaela from Integromat here, nice to meet you

Would you mind sharing a few screenshots of the scenario? It would be most helpful so that we can assist as much as we can

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JoeyHaverty
